summary: Completed testing of updated video generation features. Backend endpoints working correctly with new MiniMax integration parameters. Frontend pages load properly with required Video Editor and Ad Studio components.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Request timeout on job status checks

api_integration_issues.issue: NoneType object has no attribute 'get' error in music response parsing
api_integration_issues.impact: Music generation fails after API call
Audio generation fails but doesn't break other functionality

navigation_issues.issue: Form may not redirect properly after successful registration

passed_tests: Backend starts without errors after video generation update
MiniMaxService.generate_video has new params: subject_references, first_frame_image, generation_type
Frontend Scene Editor page structure exists with Video Editor and Ad Studio buttons
Frontend Video Editor page exists with timeline components
Frontend Ad Studio page exists with platform cards
success_percentage: Backend: 87.8%, Frontend: 90% (pages exist, minor navigation issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MiniMax music generation response parsing error ('NoneType' has no attribute 'get'). Check music generation function in run_music_generation() around line 1041 in server.py.
